narrative:
Precinct Perry Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 252 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 4.4 percentage points.
